economic_notes: Investments managed by Beutel Goodman & Company Ltd. Partnerships include Aseneskak Casino LP (14.29%), Nekote LP (14.29%), Mahihkan Bus Lines LP (16.67%, going concern uncertainty noted), CCN-Arnason Industries Joint Venture (51%). Manitoba Hydro funding received annually.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2023. Province is Manitoba (MB). Consolidates 13 entities including trusts, school, housing, health, gaming, and business corporations. Seven partnerships/joint ventures accounted for under modified equity method. Mahihkan Bus Lines LP has a going concern uncertainty noted in its own financial statements but this does not affect the consolidated statements. Large negative 'Other revenue' line (-$4,865,911) due to change in deferred revenue. ISC funding is sum of ISC core ($27,981,412) and ISC Health ($4,544,232). Balance sheet details for current liabilities, long-term debt, and tangible capital assets not fully extracted from available text. Prior year had gain on settlement of debt of $355,096 loss. Remuneration schedule not available in provided text.
warnings: High ISC dependency (97.5%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
